title: COLORIMETRIC ESTIMATION OF IRON WITH QUINALDINIC ACID. A CRITICAL STUDY
author: ANIL KUMAR MAJUMDAR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The reagent quinaldinic acid has been utilised for the colorimetric estimation of iron visually from 0.4 p.p.m. to 130 p.p.m. and from 0.6 p.p.m. to 10 p.p.m. in a photoelectric colorimeter with a 20 mm. cell. The effect of various factors and of diverge ions on the coloured complex has been critically examined. The maximum absorption due to the coloured complex was found to be in the legion of 515 μμ.
steps_raw: The reagent quinaldinic acid has been utilised for the colorimetric estimation of iron visually from 0.4 p.p.m. to 130 p.p.m. and from 0.6 p.p.m. to 10 p.p.m. in a photoelectric colorimeter with a 20 mm. cell. The effect of various factors and of diverge ions on the coloured complex has been critically examined. The maximum absorption due to the coloured complex was found to be in the legion of 515 μμ.
